title: geum donianum
intro: Geum donianum, also known as the Alpine Avens, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Geum donianum include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Geum donianum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
